languages.original_text: "The suffering of the sacred machines in the Sector Bionica verges on the heresy of annihilation. Initiating search for a tech-servant capable of third-degree benevolent purification rituals."

languages.text: "Страдания священных машин Сектора Бионика граничат с ересью уничтожения. Немедленно инициирую поиск технослужителя, способного на ритуалы благостной очистки третьей степени".
languages.translation_comment: characters entered the medbay for the first time

languages.text: "The suffering of the sacred machines in the Sector Bionica verges on the heresy of annihilation. Initiating search for a tech-servant capable of third-degree benevolent purification rituals."
languages.original_text: "Страдания священных машин Сектора Бионика граничат с ересью уничтожения. Немедленно инициирую поиск технослужителя, способного на ритуалы благостной очистки третьей степени".

"The suffering of the sacred machines in the Sector Bionica verges on the heresy of annihilation. Initiating search for a tech-servant capable of third-degree benevolent purification rituals."

languages.text: 「セクター・ビオニカの聖なる機械の苦しみは、滅ぼすという異端の域に達している。第三級の慈悲深い浄化儀式を行うことができるテクノサーバントの捜索を開始する」
languages.original_text: "The suffering of the sacred machines in the Sector Bionica verges on the heresy of annihilation. Initiating search for a tech-servant capable of third-degree benevolent purification rituals."

traits.locale_text: 「セクター・ビオニカの聖なる機械の苦しみは、滅ぼすという異端の域に達している。第三級の慈悲深い浄化儀式を行うことができるテクノサーバントの捜索を開始する。」

languages.text: « La souffrance des machines sacrées du secteur Bionica frôle l'hérésie de l'annihilation. Démarrage de la recherche d'un technoserviteur capable de réaliser des rituels de purification bienveillante de niveau trois. »
languages.original_text: "The suffering of the sacred machines in the Sector Bionica verges on the heresy of annihilation. Initiating search for a tech-servant capable of third-degree benevolent purification rituals."

traits.locale_text: « La souffrance des machines sacrées du secteur Bionica frôle l'hérésie de l'annihilation. Démarrage de la recherche d'un technoserviteur capable de réaliser des rituels de purification bienveillante de niveau trois. »

languages.text: "Das Leid der heiligen Maschinen im Sektor Bionica grenzt an die Ketzerei der Auslöschung. Initialisiere Suche nach einem Techdiener, der in der Lage ist, wohlwollende Reinigungsrituale des dritten Grades auszuführen."
languages.original_text: "The suffering of the sacred machines in the Sector Bionica verges on the heresy of annihilation. Initiating search for a tech-servant capable of third-degree benevolent purification rituals."

traits.locale_text: "Das Leid der heiligen Maschinen im Sektor Bionica grenzt an die Ketzerei der Auslöschung. Initialisiere Suche nach einem Techdiener, der in der Lage ist, wohlwollende Reinigungsrituale des dritten Grades auszuführen."

languages.text: "Sektör Biyonika'daki kutsal makinelerin çektiği acı, yok oluş kâfirliğinin sınırında. Üçüncü derece hayırsever arınma ayinlerini gerçekleştirebilecek bir tekno hizmetkâr araması başlatılıyor."
languages.original_text: "The suffering of the sacred machines in the Sector Bionica verges on the heresy of annihilation. Initiating search for a tech-servant capable of third-degree benevolent purification rituals."

traits.locale_text: "Sektör Biyonika'daki kutsal makinelerin çektiği acı, yok oluş kâfirliğinin sınırında. Üçüncü derece hayırsever arınma ayinlerini gerçekleştirebilecek bir tekno hizmetkâr araması başlatılıyor."

languages.text: «El sufrimiento de las sagradas máquinas del Sector Bionica raya en la herejía de la aniquilación. Iniciando búsqueda de un tecnosirviente capacitado para oficiar rituales de purificación benevolente de tercer grado».
languages.original_text: "The suffering of the sacred machines in the Sector Bionica verges on the heresy of annihilation. Initiating search for a tech-servant capable of third-degree benevolent purification rituals."

traits.locale_text: «El sufrimiento de las sagradas máquinas del Sector Bionica raya en la herejía de la aniquilación. Iniciando búsqueda de un tecnosirviente capacitado para oficiar rituales de purificación benevolente de tercer grado».

languages.text: “仿生区内神圣机械遭受的苦难，几近于彻底湮灭的异端之罪。立即搜寻一名能执行三级仁慈净化仪式的技术仆从。”
languages.original_text: "The suffering of the sacred machines in the Sector Bionica verges on the heresy of annihilation. Initiating search for a tech-servant capable of third-degree benevolent purification rituals."

traits.locale_text: “仿生区内神圣机械遭受的苦难，几近于彻底湮灭的异端之罪。立即搜寻一名能执行三级仁慈净化仪式的技术仆从。”
